# gaugeProvider

**Instance Property**

The gauge to display in the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<CLKGaugeProvider> @objc final var gaugeProvider: CLKGaugeProvider { get set }
```

## Accessing the Content

- **headerLabel**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
- **headerTextProvider**: The header text to display in the complication.
- **bodyTextProvider**: The main body text to display in the complication.
